## 📝 Description
Provide a detailed description of your changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## 🎯 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI change
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement
- [ ] ✅ Test improvement

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests added for new functionality
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases considered and tested

### Test Results
```bash
# Paste test output here
php artisan test --coverage
```

Add screenshots for UI changes.

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines (`vendor/bin/pint` passed)
- [ ] JavaScript/TypeScript linting passed (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Self-review of code completed
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No new warnings or errors introduced
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional format
- [ ] No `.env` or sensitive data committed
- [ ] Database migrations tested (if applicable)
- [ ] Frontend build successful (`npm run build`)

## 🔒 Security
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] Authorization checks in place
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] CSRF protection maintained

## ♿ Accessibility
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works
- [ ] Screen reader friendly
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG standards
- [ ] Focus indicators visible

## 📱 Browser Testing (if UI changes)
- [ ] Chrome
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Safari
- [ ] Edge

## 📊 Performance Impact
Describe any performance implications (positive or negative).

## 🔄 Migration Required?
- [ ] No migration needed
- [ ] Migration included and tested
- [ ] Seeder updated (if applicable)

## 📚 Documentation
- [ ] README updated (if applicable)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Code comments added for complex logic
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated

## 🤔 Questions for Reviewers
List any specific questions or areas where you'd like reviewer feedback.

## 📝 Additional Notes
Any additional information that reviewers should know.
